title: Just built a full automated trading monitoring & copy system
author: ProjectThen2835
selftext:
Hey everyone 👋

I’ve spent the last few months designing a system that connects multiple MetaTrader accounts (MT5), monitors them in real time, and can even copy trades automatically between master/slave accounts.

It includes a professional dashboard with metrics like equity curve, win rate, drawdown, profit factor — and even uses AI to detect anomalies or risky drawdowns.

It’s mostly built in Python + SQLite + Flask + PyQt, and it looks/works super clean.
If you run prop accounts, do copy trading, or manage investor portfolios, this could be 🔥 for you too.

I’m sharing access with anyone interested in trying it out.
Just send me a DM and I’ll walk you through it.

Cheers 🚀
